name: Sorry. (Entschuldigung) ~ A Psychological Horror Visual Novel
short_description: Immerse yourself in a ghostly tale of a bygone era, as you delve into the tormented mind of a troubled young man battling to keep his demons away. Piece together the fragments of his haunted reality and uncover the chilling truth that lies beneath.
detailed_description:
Immerse yourself in a ghostly tale of a bygone era, as you delve into the tormented mind of a troubled young man battling to keep his demons away. Piece together the fragments of his haunted reality and uncover the chilling truth that lies beneath.

A Haunting Twist:

With light sources scarce, you carry a gas lamp to help you unearth secrets. It's old and will dim over time, letting the shadows creep in... give it a shake to reinvigorate the flame.

Use your light to explore secretive hallways and bedrooms and if you see something interesting, click on it! Possessions once loved by their inhabitants have sat forgotten, but no longer. Special objects you find hold secrets of their own, each one unlocking a diary entry (viewable in the gallery) that provide glimpses into the protagonist's unsettling past.

Story:

As you seek solace in a foreign land teeming with the tension of impending war, your quest for refuge leads you astray. Mesmerized by a grand old house, you become entrapped by its uncanny allure. This mysterious mansion harbours not only its own dark secrets but also brings the hidden shadows of your own past to the light.

Steam Unlockables:

  • Achievements

  • Trading Cards

  • Profile Backgrounds

  • Badges

  • Emoticons

To learn a little about our protagonist in advance of reading the story, be sure to visit the website linked to the right to read exclusive diary excerpts.

For an optimal experience, read this haunting tale alone in a dark room and note that there is an option to switch the cursive font to a plain alternative in the preferences menu.
